name: Hybrid Cloud Multiple Login Failures from Same Username
notes: This rule triggers when there are multiple authentication failures to virtualization or cloud systems from the same username.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Login Failure
when at least 10 events are seen with the same Username in 5 minutes
thresholds: when at least 10 events are seen with the same Username in 5 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Hybrid Cloud Multiple Login Failures from Same Username on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:DeviceDefinition: Cloud, BB:DeviceDefinition: Virtualization
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.User Login Failure
AND when at least 10 events are seen with the same Username in 5 minutes
RED_list: Event name: Hybrid Cloud Multiple Login Failures from Same Username
Event description: Detects when there are multiple authentication failures to virtualization or cloud systems from the same username.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Username
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
